# OPTIMUS PROJECTS

OPTIMUS PROJECTS is a construction and renovation firm based in Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India.

## Core Services
- Structural work (RCC, plastering)
- Waterproofing
- Interior and exterior design
- Electrical and plumbing
- Painting and finishing
- Tiling and flooring
- Furniture installation
- Complete renovation

## Contact
- Phone: +91 73030 15133
- Email: business@optimusp.in
- Website: https://optimusp.in/
- Alternate Website: https://optimusp.one/

## Service Areas
Mumbai, Navi Mumbai, Panvel, Thane, Kalyan, Mira Bhayandar, Borivali, Alibaug.
